messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0153",
  "title": "购物",
  "page_index": 44,
  "page_range": "44-43"
}

Section text:
## 购物

Shopee Indonesia

AliExpress

Taobao

Alibaba.com

查看所有上榜应用

Point Awards 2026 预报名

message.content: This section, titled "购物" (Shopping), functions as a categorical listing of e-commerce platforms. It can answer questions regarding: **Topics** (shopping app rankings or curated lists); **Entities** (Shopee Indonesia, AliExpress, Taobao, Alibaba.com, Point Awards 2026); and **Dates** (2026, specifically for Point Awards pre-registration). It also indicates navigational context for accessing a complete list of ranked applications. The section does not contain definitions, procedures, claims, quantitative metrics, tables, figures, or evidence types. Retrieval queries should focus on identifying featured shopping apps, associated award events, and pre-registration timelines.
